get.description: Returns all user accounts. Requires permission: users:read
Returns a user by UUID. Requires permission: users:read

patch.description: Replaces the user role. A user can have only one role. Requires permission: users.roles:update

post.description: Creates a user account. The first registered account receives the ADMIN role; later users receive USER.
Authenticates by email or username and returns a JWT access token.
Revokes the current JWT by adding its token id to the Redis blacklist.

get.description: Checks the current operational status of the service.

patch.description: Enables or disables maintenance mode for the service. Requires permission: status.maintenance:update

get.description: Fetches and returns an array of all project entities stored in the system.

200.description: List of all projects retrieved successfully

get.summary: Retrieve a list of all projects

post.description: Creates a new project entity with the provided data. Requires permission: projects:create

get.description: Fetches and returns a single project entity based on the provided ID.

404.description: Project with the specified ID not found

patch.description: Updates the project entity identified by the provided ID with new data.  Requires permission: projects:update

404.description: Project with the specified ID not found

delete.description: Deletes the project entity identified by the provided ID. Requires permission: projects:delete

404.description: Project with the specified ID not found

get.description: Retrieves glucose data formatted for graphing purposes.
Retrieves data about the glucose sensor.
Retrieves the OAuth URL for Dexcom authentication. Requires permission: glucose.auth:read
Handles OAuth authentication with Dexcom service. Requires permission: glucose.auth:authorize

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: OAuth authorization code received from Dexcom

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: Error message if OAuth authorization failed

400.description: Bad request, possibly due to OAuth error

get.description: List of available glucose data providers. Requires permission: glucose.settings:read

patch.description: Set the mode for glucose data provider. Supported modes include "auto", "libre", "dexcom". Requires permission: glucose.settings:update

get.description: Retrieves time in range statistics for glucose levels.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back for time in range calculation

200.description: Successfully retrieved time in range data

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back for average glucose calculation

get.description: Retrieves the highest recorded glucose level.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back for highest glucose reading

get.description: Retrieves the lowest recorded glucose level.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back for lowest glucose reading

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to calculate glucose reading, minimum 7 days

200.description: Successfully retrieved Glucose Management Indicator data
